text.more: This network visualization represents collaboration relationships among music producers who have worked together on the same songs. Each node represents a producer, while edges indicate co-production relationships, with thicker edges showing repeated collaborations. Node size reflects the number of collaborators a producer has (degree), and node color indicates modularity-based communities of producers who frequently work together. The structure of the network highlights how producer collaborations often form within small, recurring teams rather than across a fully connected industry network.
text.intro: This interactive network visualization shows collaboration relationships between music producers, where nodes represent producers and edges represent co-production partnerships.
text.title: Producer Collaboration Network in Popular Music

legend.edgeLabel: Lines represent co-production relationships; thicker lines indicate repeated collaborations.
legend.colorLabel: Colors show collaboration communities based on modularity.
legend.nodeLabel: Each node represents a producer; larger nodes indicate more collaborations.
